forbidden_actions: Biohub call; ESMC call; live embedding rerun; embedding generation; .npy commit; data/output commit; Gate 8 promotion; Gate 9 promotion; Boltz call; AF3 call; Chai call; enrichment rerun; contrast rerun; biological claim
path_note: Creates the first controlled downstream use path for the one-row ready G3SX30 elephant MDM2 artifact. This is a concrete controlled handle for the single ready row, not a decision layer. It records that the one-row ready artifact is available for controlled downstream use. It does not call Biohub/ESMC, rerun live embedding, generate embeddings, commit the local .npy/data-output artifact, promote Gate 8 or Gate 9, rerun enrichment/contrast, call Boltz/AF3/Chai, or make a biological claim. After this PR, the next step should run an actual controlled downstream read/check for the one-row ready G3SX30 artifact.
